Notice Of Motion For Terminating Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-27-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Capital One Services' motion for terminating sanctions is granted. No opposition has been filed. The Court finds that further orders would not result in compliance. The motion for additional monetary sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

OFF CALENDAR, UNTIMELY SERVICE. =(302/REQ)PATTY LEE HUBBLE # 3058

MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY/RESPONSE TO DISCOVERY
Off Calendar May-23-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE ADOPTED: Plaintiff Capital One Services, Inc.'s motion to compel responses to special interrogatories and request for production of documents and for an order to deem certain matters admitted is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses within 21 days of notice of this order. In addition, the matters set forth in the requests for admissions are ordered admitted. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $390 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. Comm. Bruce E. Chan.
